creator: datahead4@gmail.com
text:
The attached shell archive is a proposed port for a KDE4-version of Digikam ( http://www.digikam.org/ ) based on the 0.10.0-rc1 version ( http://www.digikam.org/drupal/node/422 ).

This port requires a minimum KDE version of 4.2 because of the library dependencies from kdegraphics4.  Port is run tested on i386 (7-STABLE) and amd64 (-CURRENT) on builds cleanly in tinderbox on i386 and amd64.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
